seo.title: Print Infrastructure | Quarterfold Printabilities
seo.description: Three printing facilities and two warehouses across Navi Mumbai. 300,000 sq ft engineered so your books ship on time, every time.

hero.title: Built for Scale. Engineered for Trust.
hero.sub: Three printing facilities and two warehouses across Navi Mumbai. 300,000 sq ft engineered for one thing: books that ship on time.
hero.statAriaLabel: 300,000 square feet engineered across three printing facilities and two warehouses
hero.statFoot: Engineered across three printing facilities in Navi Mumbai

print.label: Print Capacity
print.body: 22 web offset towers alongside 6 sheetfed presses, engineered for large-volume education and commercial printing.

bind.label: Binding & Finishing
bind.body: Perfect binding, saddle stitching, section sewing and case making finish every book to spec.

ware.label: Warehousing & Dispatch
ware.body: High-capacity storage, secure stock management, order consolidation, kitting and export-ready dispatch.

tower.name: Web Offset Printing
tower.spec: 22 high-capacity web offset towers engineered for large-volume education and commercial printing. Capable of producing millions of printed forms every day, delivering exceptional speed, consistency, and colour accuracy. Multiple cut-off configurations provide flexibility for textbooks, trade books, workbooks, newspapers, and other publications.

press.name: Sheetfed Printing
press.spec: 6 state-of-the-art sheetfed presses: 1 × Eight-colour perfecting press, 5 × Four-colour presses. Featuring premium technology from Komori and Ryobi, enabling outstanding print quality for covers, coffee table books, children's books, packaging, diaries, annual reports, and premium commercial printing.

book.name: Binding & Book Finishing
book.spec: An integrated post-press setup designed for speed, durability, and precision. 3 Online Perfect Binding Lines from Bindwell. 7 six-clamp machines. 3 Müller Martini Saddle Stitching (Centre Pinning) Lines. 8 automatic Section Sewing Machines, and 17 manual sewing machines. 1 book block line, HXCP. Case maker, Kolbus DA 260. Case-in line, HXCP. Along with various spiral wire and lamination machines. Together, these systems enable the production of millions of high-quality books annually while ensuring consistent binding strength and timely deliveries.

finish.title: Value-added finishing, under one roof.
finish.note: These capabilities enhance the visual appeal and durability of every publication.

results.title: Measured, not estimated.
results.sub: Not a projection. The plant that prints and ships, counted across three printing facilities and two warehouses.

sqft.foot: Across three printing facilities and two warehouses
